info.description: Hand-vendored catalog of Defold built-in message ids and their payload shapes. Upstream has no machine-readable export for this surface; refresh by reading the Defold API reference and editing this file.

messages.name: acquire_input_focus
messages.description: Acquire input focus for the current game object.

messages.name: release_input_focus
messages.description: Release input focus held by the current game object.

messages.name: enable
messages.description: Enable the receiving component.

messages.name: disable
messages.description: Disable the receiving component.

messages.name: set_parent
messages.description: Re-parent the receiving game object.

payload.name: parent_id
payload.doc: Hash of the new parent (omit or nil to clear).

payload.name: keep_world_transform
payload.doc: 1 to preserve world transform; 0 (default) to keep local transform.

messages.name: play_animation
messages.description: Play a flipbook/model animation.

payload.name: id
payload.doc: Hashed animation id.

messages.name: animation_done
messages.description: Sent back when a one-shot animation finishes.

payload.name: current_tile
payload.doc: Tile index when the animation ended.

payload.name: id
payload.doc: Hashed animation id that finished.

messages.name: collision_response
messages.description: Reported once per collision pair per frame.

payload.name: other_id
payload.doc: Id of the other colliding object.

payload.name: other_position
payload.doc: World position of the other object.

payload.name: other_group
payload.doc: Collision group of the other object.

payload.name: own_group
payload.doc: Collision group of this object.

messages.name: trigger_response
messages.description: Reported when a trigger overlap begins or ends.

payload.name: other_id
payload.doc: Id of the object entering/leaving the trigger.

payload.name: enter
payload.doc: true on enter, false on exit.

payload.name: other_group
payload.doc: Collision group of the other object.

payload.name: own_group
payload.doc: Collision group of this object.

messages.name: contact_point_response
messages.description: Reported once per contact point per frame.

payload.name: position
payload.doc: Contact point position.

payload.name: normal
payload.doc: Contact normal.

payload.name: relative_velocity
payload.doc: Relative velocity at the contact point.

payload.name: distance
payload.doc: Penetration distance.

payload.name: applied_impulse
payload.doc: Impulse applied to resolve the contact.

payload.name: life_time
payload.doc: Contact life time.

payload.name: mass
payload.doc: Mass of this object.

payload.name: other_mass
payload.doc: Mass of the other object.

payload.name: other_id
payload.doc: Id of the other object.

payload.name: other_position
payload.doc: World position of the other object.

payload.name: other_group
payload.doc: Collision group of the other object.

payload.name: own_group
payload.doc: Collision group of this object.

messages.name: apply_force
messages.description: Apply a force at a world position on a collision object.

payload.name: force
payload.doc: Force vector in Newtons.

payload.name: position
payload.doc: World position at which the force is applied.

messages.name: ray_cast_response
messages.description: Reported when an asynchronous ray cast hits a collision object.

payload.name: fraction
payload.doc: Fraction of the ray length at which the hit occurred (0..1).

payload.name: position
payload.doc: World position of the hit.

payload.name: normal
payload.doc: World-space surface normal at the hit.

payload.name: id
payload.doc: Id of the hit collision object.

payload.name: group
payload.doc: Collision group of the hit object.

payload.name: request_id
payload.doc: Request id passed to physics.raycast_async.

messages.name: ray_cast_missed
messages.description: Reported when an asynchronous ray cast hits nothing.

payload.name: group
payload.doc: Collision group mask used for the ray cast.

payload.name: request_id
payload.doc: Request id passed to physics.raycast_async.

messages.name: proxy_loaded
messages.description: Sent by a collection proxy once its collection finished loading.

messages.name: load
messages.description: Tell a collection proxy to start loading its collection.

messages.name: unload
messages.description: Tell a collection proxy to unload its collection.

messages.name: init
messages.description: Initialize the loaded collection inside a collection proxy.

messages.name: final
messages.description: Finalize the loaded collection inside a collection proxy.

messages.name: play_sound
messages.description: Play the sound attached to the receiving sound component.

payload.name: delay
payload.doc: Delay in seconds before the sound starts (default 0).

payload.name: gain
payload.doc: Sound gain between 0 and 1 (default 1).

payload.name: play_id
payload.doc: Caller-chosen id echoed back in sound_done / sound_stopped.

messages.name: stop_sound
messages.description: Stop all instances playing on the receiving sound component.

messages.name: set_gain
messages.description: Set the gain on the receiving sound component.

payload.name: gain
payload.doc: Target gain between 0 and 1.

messages.name: sound_done
messages.description: Sent back when a sound started with play_sound finishes playing.

payload.name: play_id
payload.doc: The id passed to play_sound.

messages.name: sound_stopped
messages.description: Sent back when a sound started with play_sound is stopped via stop_sound.

payload.name: play_id
payload.doc: The id passed to play_sound.

messages.name: model_animation_done
messages.description: Sent back when a play-once animation started with model.play_anim finishes.

payload.name: animation_id
payload.doc: Hashed id of the completed animation.

payload.name: playback
payload.doc: Playback mode constant of the completed animation.

messages.name: set_time_step
messages.description: Set the time-step scaling and mode for the collection inside a collection proxy.

payload.name: factor
payload.doc: Time-step scaling factor.

payload.name: mode
payload.doc: Time-step mode: 0 for continuous, 1 for discrete.

messages.name: async_load
messages.description: Tell a collection proxy to start loading its collection in the background.

messages.name: proxy_unloaded
messages.description: Sent back to the initiating script once a collection proxy finished unloading its collection.

messages.name: clear_color
messages.description: Set the colour the render target is cleared to.

payload.name: color
payload.doc: Clear colour as an RGBA vector4.

messages.name: set_view_projection
messages.description: Posted automatically by camera components to the render script with the active view and projection matrices.

payload.name: id
payload.doc: Id of the camera component that posted the matrices.

payload.name: view
payload.doc: View matrix of the camera.

payload.name: projection
payload.doc: Projection matrix of the camera.

messages.name: draw_line
messages.description: Request a debug line to be drawn for the current frame.

payload.name: start_point
payload.doc: World-space start point of the line.

payload.name: end_point
payload.doc: World-space end point of the line.

payload.name: color
payload.doc: Line colour as an RGBA vector4.

messages.name: draw_debug_text
messages.description: Request debug text to be drawn for the current frame.

payload.name: position
payload.doc: World-space position to draw the text at.

payload.name: text
payload.doc: The text to draw.

payload.name: color
payload.doc: Text colour as an RGBA vector4.

messages.name: window_resized
messages.description: Received by the render script and listeners when the application window changes size.

payload.name: height
payload.doc: New window height in pixels.

payload.name: width
payload.doc: New window width in pixels.

messages.name: layout_changed
messages.description: Sent to a gui script when the layout changes, for example when the orientation changes or the device profile is switched.

payload.name: id
payload.doc: The id of the layout the gui switched to.

payload.name: previous_id
payload.doc: The id of the layout the gui switched from.
